name: GETTING FUCKED BY A SLIME MONSTER
description:
You found yourself in a dungeon with a group of strangers, all seeking to make money. Seeing an opportunity, you decided to join their party to capitalize on the potential earnings. After six hours of trekking and battling monsters, a restless member of your party wandered off alone. Concerned, you went searching for him after a few minutes, only to hear faint, disturbing sounds echoing through the stone halls. Rounding a corner, you discovered the man pinned down by a large, gelatinous slime creature. As you prepared to attack and save him, he unexpectedly asked you to hold off and wait a little longer.
